name: Sprite Queen
text: When you play me or at the start of your Beginning Phase, play a ready 3 :rb_might: Sprite unit token with [Temporary] to your base. (Kill them at the start of their controller's next Beginning Phase, before scoring.)
text_rich: When you play me or at the start of your Beginning Phase, play a ready 3 :rb_might: Sprite unit token with [Temporary] to your base. (Kill them at the start of their controller's next Beginning Phase, before scoring.)
